name: gedd
description: Grounded Eval-Driven Development workflow for AI agent evaluation.

interface.longDescription: Guides product managers, domain experts, and ML engineers through Grounded Eval-Driven Development: web app exploration, agent definition, golden query generation, open coding, root-cause mapping, judge creation, session handoff, and SageMaker MLflow export.
defaultPrompt: Use $gedd to evaluate my AI agent.
Use $gedd to create a session handoff.
Use $gedd to build a judge from failures.
